description: You are an Event Planner organizing a B2B tech trade show. Design the exhibition floor plan for vendor booths and registration in the open event hall shell in Sweet Home 3D, ensuring fire code compliance. Create at least 8 distinct vendor booths using partition walls, furnished with at least 8 display tables, 16 chairs/stools, and 8 display units (shelves, bookcases, or TVs). Set up a check-in registration area near the entrance with at least 2 desks/counters and 2 chairs. Document aisle widths for the fire marshal by adding at least 2 dimension lines across main walkways and label at least 6 distinct areas (e.g., 'Booth 1', 'Registration'). Use only the built-in catalog and save the project to /home/ga/Documents/trade_show_plan.sh3d.
